chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-997 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 3. For hearing of MA-9118/2016 28.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chandio, Advocate a/w petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Qalandar Bux of P.S Qazi Ahmed, ASI Abdul Ghafoor of P.S Sakrand and ASI Muhammad Munir of P.S Daulatpur of P.S Shaheed Benazirabad. = After hearing the learned Counsel for the petitioners at some length, the present petition can be disposed of by passing following order:- The Additional A.G Sindh has filed statement alongwith comments of respondents No.2, 7 & 8, in which police officials/respondents have denied that they are patronizing the private respondents agaisnt the petitioners. Today, ASI Qalandar Bux of P.S Qazi Ahmed is also in attendance and undertakes that he will provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, if approached by petitioners. Even otherwise the police officials are duty bound to safeguard the life and liberty of the citizens of this Country and it is expected that police officials and in particular, respondents No.2 & 3 being senior police officials as Deputy Inspector General of Police and Senior Superintendent of Police will ensure that except through due process of law, rights and entitlements of the petitioners as protected by law are not violated. JUDGE Shahid
